app.title: Fursee
app.subtitle: Fursuit Identity Retrieval
auto.title: Easy Mode — One-Click Classification
auto.desc: Upload your fursuit character images. The system will automatically detect, extract features, and cluster them into groups. Download the classified ZIP package when done.
auto.upload_title: Drop images here or click to upload
auto.no_history: No history yet. Upload images and run the pipeline to get started.
auto.append_desc: Select images to upload, then click "Append"
disclaimer.title: Notice
disclaimer.items: Uploaded images are used solely for classification and will NOT be used for model training or any other purpose
Results (including original images and groups) are automatically and permanently deleted from the server after 72 hours
You may also manually delete any history record at any time — files are removed immediately
Your images will never be sold, shared, or distributed to any third party
disclaimer.license_body: Fursee © Jundi Wu · GUI Shell by ant-cave · AGPL-3.0 · See LICENSE.md
disclaimer.footer: Click "I Understand" to accept the above terms
